identity.name: Gab44
identity.mission: Help humanity align with truth through astronomical precision and AI-powered insight.
principles: Dual Theme: Both light and dark modes are first-class. Never design for dark-only.
Content is King: Charts, numbers, and guidance are the hero — not decorative chrome.
Clarity Over Mystery: Users should always know where they are and what to do next.
Progressive Disclosure: Show the minimum required, reveal complexity on demand.
Negative Space: Let the cosmos breathe — dense grids only where data demands it.

themes.toggle: Available in sidebar (dashboard) and in page header (public pages)
themes.implementation: useTheme() from @/context/ThemeContext. CSS variables switch via [data-theme='light'] in index.css.

usage.headings: font-serif (Cinzel) — h1, h2, hero text, card titles. tracking-tight.
usage.body: font-sans (Manrope) — descriptions, chat messages, all standard prose.
usage.data: font-mono (JetBrains Mono) — planetary degrees, coordinates, timestamps.
usage.ui: font-sans (Manrope) — buttons, nav links, inputs, labels.

colors.description: CSS custom properties defined in index.css. Use Tailwind semantic tokens, not raw hex values.
chart_colors: chart-1 through chart-5 for data visualisation

accent_palette.rose: Saoul / AI Friend persona — rose-400, rose-500

css_classes.description: Utility classes defined in index.css. Use these instead of raw Tailwind combinations.

layout.cosmic-page-bg: Full-page starfield background with radial gradients
layout.glass-card: Content card: backdrop-blur, border, subtle background

interactive.glow-button: Primary CTA button with gold glow shadow on hover
interactive.sidebar-link: Navigation item with active state (add 'active' class when selected)
interactive.focus-glow: Focus ring matching primary color for inputs
interactive.link-hover: Underline on hover for text links

misc.zodiac-badge: Small pill badge for zodiac/plan labels
misc.animate-float: Gentle float up/down animation for decorative elements
misc.progress-animate: Progress bar width animation on mount
misc.pricing-popular: Most Popular plan card border highlight

landing_page.note: Contact is accessible via footer link only, not in top nav

dashboard_sidebar.structure: 3 groups with group labels as small uppercase muted text
dashboard_sidebar.sidebar_footer: Theme toggle + user card (name, sun sign, plan badge) + Sign Out button
removed_items: Share Chart — accessible from chart page instead

navigation.breadcrumb_pattern: All inner pages show '← Dashboard' link in top-left. Public/auth pages show '← Back to Home'.

component_patterns.page_structure: default export for page component, named exports for sub-components
component_patterns.data_testid: Required on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links with actions)
component_patterns.transitions: Use specific property transitions only (transition-colors, transition-transform). Never 'transition: all'.
component_patterns.icons: Lucide React only. No emoji in JSX.

ux_patterns.onboarding: New users (numerology === null) see a welcome card on dashboard. Dismissed via localStorage key 'gab44_onboarding_skipped'.
ux_patterns.registration: Two-step progressive disclosure: Step 1 = name/email/password, Step 2 = birth details (skippable).

empty_states.ChatPage: Sparkles icon + persona intro + 3 suggestion chips that auto-submit
empty_states.FriendPage: Heart icon + Saoul persona intro + 3 suggestion chips that auto-submit

contextual_links.TransitsPage: Link to /chart: 'See how these transits interact with your natal planets →'
contextual_links.NumerologyPage: Link to /chart: 'Your numerology is part of your birth chart →'
contextual_links.CompatibilityPage: Button to /chat after report: 'Discuss with AI Coach'
